'''Aru-Wen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who joined [[Jedi Lord|Lord]] [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth's]] [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] and fought on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]]. Aru-Wen did not take his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Set Harth]], with him, leaving Harth behind on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Aru-Wen was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Lord]] [[Skere Kaan|Kaan's]] [[thought bomb]] on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]]. His Padawan, [[Set Harth]] left the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and became a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] after his death.
